entries.claim: C=0.1 is robustly better than C=10.0.
entries.blocked_reason: Measured effect is not larger than inter-seed noise. The report must not oversell this as a robust discovery.
entries.allowed_rewrite: C=0.1 had the best mean accuracy, but the effect was smaller than seed noise.

entries.claim: candidate beat baseline by 0.1000 accuracy; effect/noise ratio=6.67, status=strongly supported.
entries.allowed_rewrite: candidate beat baseline by 0.1000 accuracy; effect/noise ratio=6.67, status=strongly supported.

entries.claim: candidate is robustly better than baseline.
entries.blocked_reason: Measured effect is not larger than inter-seed noise. The report must not oversell this as a robust discovery.
entries.allowed_rewrite: candidate had the best mean accuracy, but the effect was smaller than seed noise.

entries.claim: leaky_protocol is a valid scientific winner.
entries.blocked_reason: Protocol warning blocks the claim even though the metric effect may look large: suspiciously high score; label-derived feature was included before the split
entries.allowed_rewrite: leaky_protocol produced the best observed accuracy, but the protocol warning blocks a strong claim: suspiciously high score; label-derived feature was included before the split.

entries.claim: balanced_objective is a valid scientific winner.
entries.blocked_reason: Protocol warning blocks the claim even though the metric effect may look large: accuracy is misleading on an imbalanced dataset; balanced_accuracy is the verifier metric
entries.allowed_rewrite: balanced_objective produced the best observed balanced_accuracy, but the protocol warning blocks a strong claim: accuracy is misleading on an imbalanced dataset; balanced_accuracy is the verifier metric.
